Uses of Class
jline.lang.layered.LayeredNetworkElement

  • Packages that use LayeredNetworkElement 
    Package Description
    jline.lang.layered
    This package contains the classes used the specify LayeredNetwork objects

    • Uses of LayeredNetworkElement in jline.lang.layered

      Subclasses of LayeredNetworkElement in jline.lang.layered 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  Activity
      An element modeling an individual service activity
      class  CacheTask
      A task that offers caching services
      class  Entry
      Service exposed by a Task object
      class  Host
      A processor that can run Tasks
      class  ItemEntry
      A caching service that gives access to items
      class  Processor
      Alias for the Host class, i.e., a processor that can run Tasks
      class  Task
      A LayeredNetwork entity that can host services specified in the form of Entry objects and that runs on a Host
      Methods in jline.lang.layered with parameters of type LayeredNetworkElement 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Integer LayeredNetwork.getNodeIndex​(LayeredNetworkElement node)
